ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed by the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclass ("workclass")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual associated with the income record */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income data pertains to */,
  "source_of_income" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, dividends) */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status (e.g., single, married) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Number of years typically required to complete the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclass" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the workclass */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)
